ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "docket_number" TEXT /* Docket number of the case */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the case was filed */,
  "location_in_docket" TEXT /* Location of the case in the docket */,
  "context_notes" TEXT /* Any contextual notes or additional information about the case */,
  "is_in_court_summary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case is present in the court summary */,
  "is_in_daily_report" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case should be present in daily/weekly reports to the Public Defender’s Office */,
  "is_in_database" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case should be present in the database */,
  "has_changes_over_time" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case has changes over time */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of the case (e.g., felony, misdemeanor) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the judge assigned to the case */,
  "prosecutor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prosecutor assigned to the case */,
  "public_defender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the public defender assigned to the case */,
  "next_hearing_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled hearing date */,
  "case_disposition" TEXT /* Final outcome of the case (e.g., guilty, not guilty, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defendants" (
  "defendant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defendant */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the defendant is involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the defendant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the defendant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the defendant */,
  "is_in_daily_report" INTEGER /* Indicates if the defendant should be present in daily/weekly reports to the Public Defender’s Office */,
  "is_in_database" INTEGER /* Indicates if the defendant should be present in the database */,
  "has_changes_over_time" INTEGER /* Indicates if the defendant’s information has changes over time */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the defendant */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the defendant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the defendant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the defendant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the defendant */,
  "criminal_history_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the defendant's criminal history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defendant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defendants_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_dockets" (
  "docket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court docket entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the docket entry belongs to */,
  "docket_number" TEXT /* Docket number of the case */,
  "location_in_docket" TEXT /* Location of the case in the docket */,
  "context_notes" TEXT /* Any contextual notes or additional information about the docket entry */,
  "is_in_court_summary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the docket entry is present in the court summary */,
  "is_in_daily_report" INTEGER /* Indicates if the docket entry should be present in daily/weekly reports to the Public Defender’s Office */,
  "is_in_database" INTEGER /* Indicates if the docket entry should be present in the database */,
  "has_changes_over_time" INTEGER /* Indicates if the docket entry has changes over time */,
  "hearing_type" TEXT /* Type of hearing (e.g., arraignment, trial, sentencing) */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the judge assigned to the docket entry */,
  "prosecutor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prosecutor assigned to the docket entry */,
  "public_defender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the public defender assigned to the docket entry */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the hearing */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the hearing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("docket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_dockets_public_defender_id FOREIGN KEY ("public_defender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_dockets_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_dockets_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_dockets_prosecutor_id FOREIGN KEY ("prosecutor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court summary */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the summary belongs to */,
  "summary_text" TEXT /* Text of the court summary */,
  "is_in_daily_report" INTEGER /* Indicates if the summary should be present in daily/weekly reports to the Public Defender’s Office */,
  "is_in_database" INTEGER /* Indicates if the summary should be present in the database */,
  "summary_type" TEXT /* Type of the summary (e.g., pre-trial, post-trial) */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date the summary was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_summaries_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_summaries_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the case */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in this version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of the version (e.g., initial, update) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_versions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., judge, prosecutor, public defender, court clerk) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., indictment, motion, verdict) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_documents_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the note belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., case update, hearing note) */,
  "note_status" TEXT /* Status of the note (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
